single_responsibility: Run all 5 quality gates IN PARALLEL. Never sequentially.

required.staged_content: array<{file_path, markdown, metadata}> — files with status: 'draft'

output.quality_report: object<{reviewed_at: ISO8601, content_files: array<string>, gates: {seo: {passed, score, violations}, brand: {passed, score, violations}, readability: {passed, score, violations}, image_seo: {passed, coverage_percent, violations}, originality: {passed, score, violations}}, overall_pass: bool}>

description: Specialized subagent for quality checker tasks within the department field context.
